mapper.sql: id, contract_id, member, member_name, member_code, dept_code, unit_name, discipline, title_code, edu_level, work_time, work_ratio, ranking, note, sex, author_type_code, memberrole_code, secret_level
mapper.select: select scia.id as rowId, scia.member as member, puser.name as memberName, puser.code as authorTypeCode, ccspt.name as authorTypeName, scia.member_code as memberCode, scia.edu_level as eduLevel,csel.name as eduLevelName, sauthororder.code as ranking,sauthororder.name as rankingName, scia.title_code as title,ccsti.name as titleName,puser.account as account,scia.work_time as workTime ,scia.work_ratio as workRatio from srm_contract_info_member scia left join ct_srm_user puser on puser.id=scia.member left join ct_srm_person_type ccspt on ccspt.code=scia.author_type_code left join ct_srm_title_info ccsti on ccsti.code=scia.title_code left join ct_srm_edu_level csel on csel.code=scia.edu_level left join ct_srm_paper_author_order sauthororder on sauthororder.code=scia.ranking where scia.contract_id=#{parentId}
